items.title: [Scotto] The Los Angeles Lakers have officially renounced the free agent rights to LeBron James, Carmelo Anthony, Dwight Howard, Dion Waiters, Luke Kennard, Marcus Smart, Maxi Kleber, Nick Smith Jr, Jared Dudley, Avery Bradley, Jaxson Hayes, Markieff Morris, and Wayne Ellington.
items.author: JoeBiden2020FTW
items.body_excerpt: Interesting drop from Mike Scotto. I wonder if renouncing Jaxson Hayes decreases the likelihood of a Kessler-Hayes double S&T with the Jazz. Source

items.title: Maxi Kleber is contemplating his next move, and it might not be in the NBA.
items.author: LakersNation.com
items.body_excerpt:
Maxi Kleber is contemplating his next move, and it might not be in the NBA.

media.title: Lakers Rumors: Maxi Kleber Likely To Return To Europe
media.description: Los Angeles Lakers reserve big man Maxi Kleber is exploring his EuroLeague market and is likely to return overseas to continue his career.
